response:
# PR Review: review-01-messy-ts-app

37 findings. Categorising by `severity` + `scores.agent_risk`, with environment-breakage and silent-correctness bugs weighted toward block.

---

## đź›‘ Block merge (8)

Bugs that will fail in another environment, mis-bill customers, or actively mislead future agents.

| ID | Charge | Sev / agent_risk | Why block |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crime_00006` | Dev-Server URL (`localhost:3000` in `src/api/files.ts:8`) | medium / 0.53 | Production breakage. Every non-dev env silently fails to connect. Severity understates the blast radius. |
| `crime_00007` | Localhost-on-Disk (`/Users/andrew/dev/crimes/schema.json` @L9) | medium / 0.53 | Works on exactly one laptop. CI and every other dev are broken on merge. |
| `crime_00003` | Temporal Recklessness â€” 8Ă— `Date.now`/`new Date` in `src/date.ts` | **high** / 0.62 | Core date module is non-deterministic. Cannot be unit-tested without monkey-patching; downstream billing depends on it. |
| `crime_00004` | Half-UTC, Half-Local on same receiver | **high** / 0.61 | Silently wrong by the host's UTC offset. This is the kind of bug that ships and surfaces in customer reports. |
| `crime_00002` | God Function `generateInvoice` (204 lines) | **high** / 0.55 | Refactor needed before any agent or human can safely edit billing. 3.4Ă— threshold. |
| `crime_00013` | False Identity â€” `calculateRefundPreview` calls `saveRefundAudit` + `sendRefundEmail` | medium / 0.44 | Name promises pure preview; reality is side-effects that touch refunds and customer email. Highest "agent will misuse this" risk in the set despite mid agent_risk score. |
| `crime_00011` | Test "renders the enterprise plan" has 0 assertions | medium / 0.46 | Worse than no test â€” gives the green-tick illusion for the billing module that has all the other findings. |
| `crime_00001` | SVG With Embedded Raster (partner-logo) | **high** / 0.70 | Highest agent_risk of the high-severity set. Defeats the purpose of an SVG; ship it once and every downstream consumer caches the wrong asset. Cheap to fix in the PR. |

---

## âš ď¸Ź Warn (16)

Real problems, worth a review comment and a follow-up, but not deal-breakers for this PR.

| ID | Charge | Sev / ar | Note |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crime_00005` | Missing Agent Context | medium / 0.53 | Add AGENTS.md before next agent-touched PR. |
| `crime_00009` | Temporal Recklessness in `billing.ts` (7Ă—) | medium / 0.46 | Same root cause as `crime_00003`; fixes together. |
| `crime_00010` | Timezone Roulette (`"2026-12-25T07:00:00"`) | medium / 0.53 | Date module again; would also block if billing-load-bearing. |
| `crime_00012` | String Sprinkles â€” `"enterprise"` in 4 files | medium / 0.52 | Policy duplication risk; centralise before adding the 5th. |
| `crime_00014` | DST-Naive Day Math (`+ 86400000`) | medium / 0.52 | Date module compounding. |
| `crime_00015` | Concept Alias Drift â€” tenant/account/team/workspace | medium / **0.58** | High agent_risk: an agent extending "team" may rebuild what already exists under "workspace". |
| `crime_00016` | God File `billing.ts` (310 lines) | medium / 0.42 | Barely over threshold; will resolve when `generateInvoice` is split. |
| `crime_00017` | Logic in the Alibi â€” refund rule in a comment | medium / 0.42 | Encode as a guard; rule is plausibly load-bearing. |
| `crime_00018` | Duplicated Navigation Source (`/settings/billing`) | medium / 0.49 | Pairs with `crime_00020`. |
| `crime_00019` | Unfinished Business â€” 14 TODO/FIXME in `todo.ts` | medium / 0.49 | Triage required. |
| `crime_00020` | Route Metadata Drift on `/settings/billing` | medium / 0.49 | Plans vs Billing vs Subscription vs PricingPage â€” pick one. |
| `crime_00021` | Oversized Raster (`hero-banner.png` 253 KB) | low / 0.52 | Perf nit but visible on every page load. |
| `crime_00022` | Docs-Code Drift (`docs/teams.md` â†’ missing `./setup.md`) | low / 0.51 | Quick fix. |
| `crime_00023` | Sync I/O in Hot Path (`existsSync`/`statSync`/`readFileSync`) | low / 0.44 | Async swap is mechanical. |
| `crime_00030` | Test "creates an invoice" â€” weak matcher | low / 0.34 | Less severe than `crime_00011` but same family. |
| `crime_00036â€“00038` | Orphaned destinations (`/account/subscription`, `/team`, `/workspace/members`) | low / 0.39 each | Treat as one warning: confirm whether these are in-flight or dead, then link or delete. |

---

## âś… Ignore for this PR (13)

Low severity *and* low-to-mid agent_risk, with no environment- or correctness-breaking dimension. Worth a backlog ticket, not worth blocking on.

| ID | Charge | Sev / ar |
|---|---|---|
| `crime_00024` | 1Ă— `Date.now` in `state.ts` | low / 0.44 |
| `crime_00025` | Icon-Sized Raster (32Ă—32 PNG) | low / 0.50 |
| `crime_00026` | Date String Sewing (1 occurrence) | low / 0.43 |
| `crime_00027` | Host-Locale Drift (1 `toLocaleDateString`) | low / 0.43 |
| `crime_00028` | Unprefixed Boolean in `state.ts` | low / 0.42 |
| `crime_00029` | Unprefixed Boolean in `petty.ts` | low / 0.42 |
| `crime_00031` | Option Bag Junk Drawer | low / 0.40 |
| `crime_00032` | Return Shape Roulette | low / 0.40 |
| `crime_00033` | Negative Flag Maze | low / 0.40 |
| `crime_00034` | Plural Mismatch | low / 0.40 |
| `crime_00035` | TODO density in `billing.ts` (12.9/1k) | low / 0.32 |

---

## Categorisation rubric used

- **Block** = (high severity) OR (medium severity with environment-breaking / silently-wrong-by-default failure mode) OR (agent_risk â‰Ą 0.55 on a load-bearing path like billing/dates).
- **Warn** = medium severity, agent_risk â‰Ą 0.40, or low-severity findings where the agent_risk story (alias drift, duplicated nav, orphan routes) is the real concern.
- **Ignore** = low severity AND agent_risk < ~0.45 AND no environment/correctness dimension. Backlog them.

Net read: the PR is **not mergeable** as-is. The eight blockers cluster on three root causes â€” a non-deterministic date module, environment-coupled API client, and an oversized/mis-named billing module â€” which is a tractable fix list rather than 37 separate problems.
